metadata.homeTitle: Jungle Wildlife Tours · Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica
metadata.homeDescription: Nature and wildlife tours in Manuel Antonio and Quepos. Ground safari, mangrove kayak tour on Damas Island, and night walk with an ICT-certified guide.

hero.eyebrow: Every trail tells a wild story

hero.subtitle: Find your adventure
hero.description: Guided nature tours through Manuel Antonio's hidden corners — with local guides who know every track, every season, every creature.

about.title: About us
about.intro: We are a local nature tour company in Manuel Antonio and Quepos, focused on real wildlife experiences in Costa Rica's central Pacific region.
about.story: Born here, based here. We're not a travel agency or an intermediary: the guide who meets you is the same person who knows every trail, every channel, every creature's hiding spot.

certifications.ict: Guide certification issued by the ICT

whyUsCards.localBody: Born and raised in Manuel Antonio. We know every trail, every hiding spot, every season rhythm.
whyUsCards.certifiedBody: ICT-certified professionals with deep knowledge of Costa Rica's biodiversity and conservation.
whyUsCards.smallBody: Intimate experiences, never crowded. Your pace, your interests, our full attention.

night.heading: When darkness falls, the jungle wakes
night.description: Most visitors leave before sunset. That's when Manuel Antonio reveals its second act — amphibians calling, insects glowing, mammals stirring where no daytime crowd reaches.
night.imageAlt: Nocturnal wildlife in Manuel Antonio jungle

parallax.heading: Nature never follows a script
parallax.description: That's the beauty of it. No two tours are ever the same — and that's exactly how it should be.

faq.title: Frequent questions
faq.whatBringAnswer: Comfortable walking shoes, insect repellent, sunscreen, a reusable water bottle, and your camera. We recommend light, long clothing for the night walk.
faq.transportIncludedAnswer: Yes, round-trip transportation from Manuel Antonio and Quepos hotels is included in all our tours. Pick-up times are confirmed after booking.
faq.canChildrenAnswer: Absolutely. Our ground safari and mangrove kayak tour are family-friendly. The night walk is suitable for kids 6 and up who are comfortable in low-light settings.
faq.whatWildlife: What wildlife can I expect to see?
faq.whatWildlifeAnswer: It varies by season and time of day. Sloths, monkeys, toucans, iguanas, frogs, snakes, and butterflies are common. Remember — nature never follows a script.
faq.ifRainsAnswer: Rain is part of the rainforest experience. Tours run rain or shine unless there's a safety concern. The wildlife is often more active during and after light showers.
faq.beginnerFriendly: Are the tours suitable for beginners?
faq.beginnerFriendlyAnswer: Yes. Our guides adjust the pace to your group. No special fitness level required — just curiosity and comfortable walking shoes.
